name: Jo Mazzotti-a Brunch Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Lean ground pork (or lean ground beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground pork (or beef) in butter or oil until well browned.
2. Add onions and cook until softened.
3. Stir in tomato paste, mushrooms, celery, green peppers, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 15 minutes to develop a rich sauce.
4. Mix in cubed cheddar cheese.
5. Cook noodles separately in boiling salted water until just tender, then drain.
6. Combine the cooked noodles with the casserole mixture and transfer to a baking dish.
7. Cover tightly and bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or simmer on top of the stove uncovered for an additional hour.
8. Serve hot, portioned for 12-16 people.
